allow: Bash(sed -i '' -e 's/\\.logo img{height:80px;width:auto}/.logo img{height:80px!important;width:auto}/g' -e 's/\\.logo img{height:52px}/.logo img{height:52px!important}/g' -e 's/background:var\(--navy\);height:84px;display:flex/background:var\(--navy\);height:88px;display:flex/g' -e 's/top:84px;left:0/top:88px;left:0/g' index.html leistungen.html preise.html ueber-uns.html kontakt.html impressum.html datenschutz.html)

Bash(perl -i -pe 's{\(<meta name="viewport"[^>]*/>\)}{$1\\n<link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="favicon.png"/>\\n<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="favicon.png"/>}' index.html leistungen.html preise.html ueber-uns.html kontakt.html impressum.html datenschutz.html)
